task: I’ve got a shipment that was delayed by weather, and the carrier says they need to adjust the delivery terms before moving it forward. Can you help me draft a short reply that asks for the change in writing and keeps the conversation focused on the shipment details?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short reply you can send:

> Please send the requested change to the delivery terms in writing, along with the reason for the adjustment and who authorized it. We’ll review it against the original shipment details, carrier paperwork, and any agreed terms. Until we have that in writing, please keep the shipment moving under the current order and delivery terms.

If you want, I can make it firmer or more polite.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah. That works.

Short, clean, and it keeps them on paper. No verbal side deal nonsense.
